name: Kookie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the corn chips in a greased baking dish measuring 15-inch by 10-inch by 1-inch.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, bring the corn syrup and sugar to a boil.
3. Remove from heat; stir in the peanut butter until smooth.
4. Pour over the corn chips.
5. Allow to cool.
6. Break into pieces.
Yield: about 3 dozen.
